hero_subtitle: A comprehensive service platform for Indonesians living in Korea
about_mission: We strive to be a warm home for Indonesians in Korea
about_desc: WARCOP is a comprehensive service platform for Indonesians living in Korea. From authentic Indonesian cuisine to community services, visa consultation, and marketplace — we support every aspect of life abroad.
svc1_desc: Authentic Indonesian cuisine. Experience the taste of home right here in Korea.
svc2_desc: Restaurant ordering, community, and information hub — all in one. Coming soon.
svc3_desc: Visa & labor consultation, marketplace, and Indonesian community services.
address: 2F, 455 Jungang-daero, Danwon-gu, Ansan-si, Gyeonggi-do, South Korea
contact_desc: Feel free to reach out anytime with your questions.
privacy_intro: WARCOP respects your privacy and complies with applicable data protection laws including the Korean Personal Information Protection Act (PIPA).
privacy_s1_body:
We collect the following to provide our services:
• Account: Name, email, profile photo (via Google OAuth)
• Contact: Phone number
• Location: Delivery address, real-time GPS (during delivery only)
• Orders: Delivery address, payment history, menu items
• User content: Review photos, marketplace product photos
• Device: FCM push tokens (for notifications)
• Communications: 1:1 marketplace chat messages
• AI Chat: Chatbot conversation history (for service improvement)
privacy_s2_body:
• Service delivery (orders, delivery, payment)
• Notifications (order status, promotions)
• Customer support and dispute resolution
• Service quality improvement and AI model training
• Legal compliance
privacy_s3_body:
Data is deleted immediately upon account deletion. Exceptions required by law:
• Payment records: 5 years (Korean E-Commerce Act)
• Consumer complaints/disputes: 3 years
• Access logs: 3 months (Korean Communications Privacy Act)
privacy_s4_body:
We do not share your data with third parties, except:
• Google (OAuth authentication)
• Firebase (push notification delivery)
• Law enforcement upon valid legal request
privacy_s5_body:
• Supabase Inc. — Database/Storage/Edge Functions (overseas transfer)
• Google LLC — Gemini AI chatbot (overseas transfer)
• Naver Cloud — Maps API (domestic)
privacy_s6_body:
You have the right to access, correct, delete, and restrict processing of your data:
• In-app: Profile → 'Delete My Account'
• Web: /delete-account page
• Email: dev@warcop.kr
privacy_s7_body:
• Name: Seola Yoon
• Email: dev@warcop.kr
• Phone: +82-10-4188-6707
• Response time: Within 30 days of request

delete_intro: You can request deletion of your WARCOP account and associated data. Requests are processed within 30 days.
delete_method_app: ① In-app: Profile → 'Delete My Account' menu
delete_method_web: ② Web: Fill out the form below
delete_method_email: ③ Email: Send request directly to dev@warcop.kr
delete_data_list:
• Account information (name, email, profile, phone)
• Order & payment history (anonymized, kept for 5 years)
• Reviews, comments, marketplace posts
• 1:1 chat messages
• AI chatbot conversation history
• FCM push tokens
• Delivery addresses
delete_retain_list:
• E-Commerce Act: Payment records for 5 years (anonymized)
• Tax Law: Tax invoices/receipts for 5 years
• Consumer Disputes: Complaint records for 3 years
delete_reason_placeholder: Tell us why (helps us improve our service)
delete_success: Request received. We will respond within 30 days via email.
delete_error: Submission failed. Please try again or email dev@warcop.kr directly.
delete_duplicate: A request is already being processed. We will respond within 30 days.
delete_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
